summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AI Incident Co-Pilot application. Fixed critical backend bug where LLM was returning arrays instead of strings. All core functionality working including RAG integration, LLM analysis, and frontend-backend integration.

critical_bugs.issue: LLM returning resolution_steps as array instead of string, causing Pydantic validation error
critical_bugs.status: FIXED - Added normalization function to handle arrays from LLM

passed_tests: Backend analyze endpoint with simple tickets
Backend analyze endpoint with complex P1 tickets
Backend error handling for invalid input
Frontend main page loading and UI components
Frontend analyze button and loading states
Frontend analysis results display (priority, confidence, summary, root cause, resolution)
Copy to clipboard functionality for bridge updates

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (13/14 tests passed - minor script syntax issue)
